name: hermes
notes: Skills and knowledge documents are copied from the main repository. Each skill may have its own runtime dependencies; check the individual SKILL.md files. Built-in capabilities: Skill Sync (Local mode) via `hermes skill-sync --help`; Loop Engineering with Sub-Agent orchestration (Fan-out/Fan-in), builder-checker pattern, 7 stop rules, tool-level isolation, L1/L2/L3 staged autonomy, and OpenClaw Gateway integration via `hermes loop --help`. v0.5.0 merges the workbench (P6-P12 cross-platform, memory deepening, IMA integration, observability) with v0.4.0 UI/Design stack (5 layers: figma-reader / ui-design-system / ui-review-checklist / style-dictionary-sync / component-library-selector / design-spec-skill-creator / prototype-validator / storybook-chromatic / liquid-glass-builder). See knowledge/ui-design-stack.md and knowledge/architecture.md for design rationale.
